title: gymnadenia nigra subsp. cenisia
intro: Gymnadenia nigra subsp. cenisia is a subspecies of the Gymnadenia nigra orchid, a rare and endangered plant species native to the Alps. It is a type of orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits and medicinal properties. The Gymnadenia nigra subsp. cenisia is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, it has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
